docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINAUNCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (5TH RESET) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF URQUIDEZ, ALBA AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKMAN, DEBRA
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-03-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-02-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (SERVICE FEE $40/SHERIFF) FILED BY PLAINTIFF URQUIDEZ, ALBA AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKMAN, DEBRA
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-02-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-02-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-11-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HAS BEEN UNABLE TO EFFECT SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. THIS IS THE 5TH RESET/CONTINUANCE DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S INABILITY TO SERVE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF ALBA URQUIDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEBRA BOOKMAN IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUL-13-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. ***ORGINALLY SCHEDULED FOR JUL-14-2022 AT 10AM IN ERROR***. PLAINTIFF ALBA URQUIDEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT DEBRA BOOKMAN IS PRESEN WITH WITNESS, VIA ZOOM, SOVETH SOUS OF MERCURY INSURANCE. THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE: PLAINTIFF IS TO BRING HER SON AND HUSBAND TO THE NEXT COURT HEARING. DEFENDANT IS TO GET A COPY OF THE RECORDING OF THE PLAINTIFF FROM MERCURY INSURANCE. ALL PARTIES ARE TO BRING ALL THEIR EVIDENCE BACK TO THE COURTROOM. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URQUIDEZ, ALBA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOOKMAN, DEBRA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY URQUIDEZ, ALBA AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKMAN, DEBRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-02-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE:$110.00 SERVED MAR-30-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKMAN, DEBRA
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED BUT NOT FILED. (CORRESPONDENCE/DEFENDANT'S BRIEF WITH EXHIBITS) (FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR HEARING: MAY-11-2022 AT 10AM) AS TO DEFENDANT BOOKMAN, DEBRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-13-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-13-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ALBA URQUIDEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRER PATRICE BINAISA. DEFENDANT DEBRA BOOKMAN IS PRESENT. OTHER APPEARANCES: WITNESSES FOR THE PLAINTIFF JORGE URGUIDEZ, SON AND SAUL BERNAL, HUSBAND. WITNESS FOR THE DEFENDANT: ROSEMARY GRAHAM, MERCURY INSURANCE, CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE. WITNESS PROVIDED TRANSCRIPT REQUESTED BY THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-07-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-03-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-10-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-07-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
